mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_community_post tcp
tcp.post_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
tcp.user_nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_community_post ( user_no, post_title, post_content, post_date, post_view_count, user_nickname ) VALUES ( #{userNo}, #{postTitle}, #{postContent}, NOW(), 0, #{userNickname} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_community_post SET post_title = #{postTitle}, post_content = #{postContent}, user_nickname = #{userNickname}, post_date = NOW() WHERE post_no = #{postNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_community_comment ( user_no, post_no, user_nickname, comment_content, post_date ) VALUES ( #{userNo}, #{postNo}, #{userNickname}, #{commentContent}, NOW() )
mapper.select:
SELECT tcp.post_no, tcp.user_no, tcp.post_title, tcp.user_nickname, tcp.post_date, ( SELECT COUNT(post_like_no) FROM tbl_post_like tpl WHERE tpl.post_no = tcp.post_no ) AS like_count FROM tbl_community_post tcp
tcp.post_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
tcp.user_nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY tcp.post_date DESC LIMIT #{startRow}, #{endRow}

SELECT post_no, post_title, user_nickname, post_date
FROM tbl_community_post
post_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
user_nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY post_date DESC

SELECT tcp.post_no, tcp.post_title, tcp.user_nickname
FROM tbl_community_post tcp
WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tbl_post_image tpi WHERE tpi.post_no = tcp.post_no )
ORDER BY tcp.post_date DESC
LIMIT 3
